name: codelabs-dev-servers
description: Production-grade local development server manager. Deterministic ports (same project = same ports forever), zero collisions across multiple projects, optional HTTPS dev domains via embedded Caddy + mkcert. Two modes: 'ports' (localhost:PORT, fast HMR) or 'domains' (https://dev.myapp.localhost, simulates production cookies/OAuth/Service Workers). Includes init, start, stop, restart, list, port-lookup, add-service skills.
